captured_by: M4.5 Phase 3 realized-anchor provisioning. Raw realized facts from the committed uber_companyfacts.json (FY2025 10-K) as computed by the M2a spine: revenue_growth_next_5y = trailing 3-year revenue CAGR FY2023->FY2025 ((52017/37281)^(1/2)-1 = 0.1812); after_tax_operating_margin = FY2025 spine NOPAT margin (0.0802); sales_to_invested_capital = FY2025 capital turnover incl goodwill (revenue 52017 / invested_capital_incl_gw 31497 = 1.651); sales_to_invested_capital_ex_goodwill = FY2025 ex-goodwill turnover (revenue 52017 / invested_capital_ex_gw 22566 = 2.305). These are the raw sourced facts only; the fade of trailing growth to a forecast-sustainable base and the choice of the ex-goodwill turnover are house judgments recorded in config/sector_brackets.yaml, not here.

UBER realized (FY2025 companyfacts).note: Single-company realized anchor (n=1 by construction, not a cross-sectional sample). Growth here is trailing realized, not a forward estimate; the forward base growth is faded in the house layer.
